# org-edna edge case fixtures for org-tools
#+TITLE: Org-Edna Edge Cases

* Valid BLOCKER with ids() reference
Two entries with IDs where the second is blocked by the first.

** TODO First task
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-task-1
:END:
This task must be completed before the second one.

** TODO Second task (blocked)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-task-2
:BLOCKER: ids(edna-task-1)
:END:
This task is blocked until edna-task-1 is DONE.

* Valid TRIGGER with todo!() action
An entry that triggers a state change on another entry upon completion.

** TODO Trigger source
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-trigger-src
:TRIGGER: ids(edna-trigger-tgt) todo!(TODO)
:END:
When this is marked DONE, the target switches to TODO.

** DONE Trigger target
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-trigger-tgt
:END:
This entry will be set to TODO when the source completes.

* Valid structural finders
Entries using relative structural finders.

** TODO Parent task
:PROPERTIES:
:TRIGGER: children todo!(TODO)
:END:

*** TODO Child A
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: parent
:END:

*** TODO Child B
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: previous-sibling
:END:

** TODO Sibling after
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: previous-sibling
:END:

** TODO Sibling before trigger
:PROPERTIES:
:TRIGGER: next-sibling todo!(DONE)
:END:

** TODO Next sibling target

* Valid match() finder
Entry blocked until all entries matching a tag query are done.

** TODO Prepare release
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: match("release_blocker") todo-state?(DONE)
:END:
Blocked until all entries tagged :release_blocker: are DONE.

** TODO Fix critical bug                                     :release_blocker:
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-bug-1
:END:

** TODO Update changelog                                     :release_blocker:
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: edna-bug-2
:END:

* Valid condition with has-property?
Entry with a property-based condition.

** TODO Conditional task
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: ids("edna-task-1") has-property?("CATEGORY" "project")
:END:
Only unblocked if edna-task-1 has a CATEGORY property set.

* Valid if/then/else/endif
Conditional edna block with branching logic.

** TODO Branching task
:PROPERTIES:
:TRIGGER: if todo-state?("DONE") then ids("edna-trigger-tgt") todo!("TODO") else ids("edna-task-2") todo!("WAITING") endif
:END:
If edna-task-1 is done, set trigger-tgt to TODO; otherwise set task-2 to WAITING.

* Invalid: unknown finder — should trigger W035
Entry with a finder that does not exist in edna.

** TODO Bad finder
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: nonexistent-finder(edna-task-1)
:END:

* Invalid: action missing ! — should trigger W035
Actions in edna require a trailing bang (e.g. todo!(), not todo()).

** TODO Bad action
:PROPERTIES:
:TRIGGER: ids(edna-task-1) todo(DONE)
:END:

* Invalid: unclosed parentheses — should trigger W035
Malformed edna expression with mismatched parens.

** TODO Bad parens
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: ids(edna-task-1 todo-state?(DONE)
:END:

* Content inside a code block with :BLOCKER:
Lint must not flag edna-like properties inside source blocks.

#+begin_src org
,** TODO Fake task
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: nonexistent-finder(foo)
:TRIGGER: ids(bar) todo(NOPE)
:END:
#+end_src

#+begin_example
:PROPERTIES:
:BLOCKER: broken(syntax
:END:
#+end_example
